zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Umfridus first Colquhoun Kilpatrick於1190年出生在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾時，他的父親Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun40歲，母親Annabelle Kilpatrick41歲。他於1218年與Isobell Kilpatrick在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾拉斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1260年在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭韋斯特 登巴頓史爾度巴頓笛卡爾 度巴頓 帕里什 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Umfridus first Colquhoun Kilpatrick于1190年出生在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾时，他的父亲Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun40岁，母亲Annabelle Kilpatrick41岁。他于1218年与Isobell Kilpatrick在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾拉斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1260年在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰韋斯特 登巴頓史爾度巴頓笛卡爾 度巴頓 帕里什 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Colquhoun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Colquhoun in Dumbartonshire. The name appears to derive from Gaelic còil, cùil ‘nook, corner’, or coill(e) ‘wood’ + cumhann ‘narrow’. The usual Scottish pronunciation is ka-hoon. This is the name of a Scottish family descended from Umfridus de Kilpatrick, who acquired lands in the barony of Colquhoun during the reign of Alexander II (1214–49).

variants.name: Cohoon
meanings: English (Cheshire) and Scottish: variant of   Colquhoun  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Calhoun
meanings: History: This prominent early American name was brought across the Atlantic Ocean by Scotch-Irish pioneers who entered Pennsylvania c. 1733. The American statesman John c. Calhoun (1782–1850), born in Abbeville District, SC, served in both houses of Congress, was secretary of war, and vice president of the US (1825–32).

variants.name: Cahoon
meanings: Irish (Down and Antrim): variant (reflecting the traditional pronunciation) of Scottish   Colquhoun  .

nameMeanings.name: Kilpatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

variants.name: Kirkpatrick
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Dumfriess called Kirkpatrick or any of various other places in Scotland, all so named from the dedication of their church to Saint Patrick. The Scottish word kirk sometimes replaced Gaelic cill ‘church’ in placenames; compare Kilpatrick .

variants.name: Fitzpatrick
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Declan, Ronan, Liam, Seamus, Sinead, Siobhan, Aileen, Bridie, Brigid, Conan.

Irish: occasionally this may be a genuine Anglo-Norman French patronymic meaning ‘son of Patrick ’, but more often it has been adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Pádraig, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Patrick’ (see Kilpatrick ).

variants.name: Gilpatrick
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (see Kilpatrick ).

nameMeanings.name: first
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Umfridus first Colquhoun Kilpatrick was born in 1190, in Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun, was 40 and his mother, Annabelle Kilpatrick, was 41. He married Isobell Kilpatrick in 1218, in Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1260, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Old Dumbarton Parish Churchyard, Dumbarton, West Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Umfridus first Colquhoun Kilpatrick est né en 1190, à Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Annabelle Kilpatrick, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Isobell Kilpatrick en 1218, à Luss, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1260, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Old Dumbarton Parish Churchyard, Dumbarton, West Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1218 in Luss, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Isobell Kilpatrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1260 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Old Dumbarton Parish Churchyard, Dumbarton, West Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Umfridus first Colquhoun Kilpatrick è nato il nel 1190 nel Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Annabelle Kilpatrick, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Isobell Kilpatrick nel 1218, nel Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: Lord Umfridus first Colquhoun Kilpatrickが1190年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhounは40歳，母Annabelle Kilpatrickは41歳であった。1218年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアルスでIsobell Kilpatrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1260年に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドウエスト ダンバートンシュアイアダンバートンオルド ダンバートン パーイッシュ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Umfridus first Colquhoun Kilpatrick(이)가 1190년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Annabelle Kilpatrick(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1218년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 루스에서 Isobell Kilpatrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1260년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 웨스트 던바토실르 드바턴 드 드바턴 파리시 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

ru.Luss, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: лусс, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Umfridus first Colquhoun Kilpatrick родился в 1190 г. в местности дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Annabelle Kilpatrick, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Isobell Kilpatrick в 1218 г. в местности лусс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1260 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности олд думбартон пэриш чурчярд, думбартон, вест дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.Luss, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: Luss, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Umfridus first Colquhoun Kilpatrick nació en 1190, en Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Gilbert Colquhoun - Lord of Colquhoun, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Annabelle Kilpatrick, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Isobell Kilpatrick en 1218, en Luss, Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1260, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Old Dumbarton Parish Churchyard, Dumbarton, West Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
